scene_descriptions.page_description: The standard Google search homepage with the logo, a central search bar, and buttons for 'Google Search' and 'I'm Feeling Lucky'.
A dark overlay screen displaying task instructions for a user research session.
The Google search homepage, identical to the first frame.
A dark overlay screen with specific task instructions about planning a holiday to London from the Sunshine Coast.
The task instruction screen with expanded text detailing the planning process.
A dark overlay screen asking the user 'What are you looking at right now?'.
The same task instruction screen as the previous frame.
The Skyscanner homepage featuring a flight search widget with fields for origin, destination, and dates.
The Skyscanner homepage, showing the flight search widget.
The Skyscanner homepage with 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)' entered into the 'From' field.
A loading screen for flight search results from Sunshine Coast to London. Skeleton loaders are visible for the flight cards.
Flight search results page showing various flight options with prices, times, and airline logos.
The flight search results page, showing updated prices and flight options.
The flight search results page, showing 997 results sorted by 'Best'.
The flight search results page, scrolled down to show more flight options and a 'Explore hotels' call to action.
The flight search results page, showing various flight deals.
The flight search results page, showing flight options from Qantas and Qatar Airways.
The flight search results page with the '2+ stops' filter selected.
The flight search results page, scrolled down to the airline filters section.
The flight search results page, showing the top of the results list again.
The flight search results page, showing flight options.
The flight search results page, showing flight options.
A Trello board titled 'Japan' with multiple lists containing cards for travel planning (Tokyo To Do, Tokyo Food, etc.).
The 'Japan' Trello board, showing various travel-related cards.
Back on the Skyscanner flight search results page.
A blank white screen, likely during a page transition.
The Booking.com homepage with a 'Genius' sign-in popup overlay.
The Booking.com homepage with the search widget for stays.
The Booking.com homepage, showing the search widget.
The Booking.com homepage with 'London' entered as the destination.
visible_interactive_elements: Add flights to my search checkbox

scene_descriptions.page_description: Search results page on Booking.com for stays in London, showing a list of properties with images and prices.
The Booking.com search results page for London.
The Booking.com search results page for London.
The Booking.com search results page for London.
The Booking.com search results page, scrolled down to show more property listings.
A dark overlay screen asking the user 'What are you thinking about doing next?'.
The same task instruction screen as the previous frame.
